summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Employee Issue Ticket System. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: Admin and Employee pages fully functional with all features working.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height being -1 (Recharts library issue) - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

GET_categories.description: Returns 6 categories (IT & System Support, HR Support, Finance & Accounts, Admin & Stationery, Compliance & Legal, Operations) with subcategories and assigned roles

POST_create_ticket.description: Creates ticket with category, subcategory, subject, description, priority. Auto-assigns to department based on category. Generates TKT-YYYYMMDD-XXX ticket numbers.

GET_list_tickets.description: Lists tickets with filters (status, priority, category) and search. Role-based filtering works - employees see only their tickets, admins see all.

GET_stats.description: Returns comprehensive stats: total, by_status (7 statuses), by_priority (High/Medium/Low), by_category (6 categories), avg_resolution_hours

PUT_status_update.description: All 7 status transitions work: Open -> In Progress -> Waiting for Approval -> On Hold -> Resolved -> Closed. Resolution notes saved correctly.

POST_feedback.description: Feedback endpoint tested - requires resolved/closed ticket status

admin_page_stats.description: Admin Issue Tickets page shows stats (Total/Open/In Progress/Resolved) and priority breakdown (High/Medium/Low)

admin_page_ticket_list.description: Ticket list displays correctly with ticket numbers, subjects, status badges, category icons, dates

admin_page_filters.description: All filters work: Status, Priority, Category, and Search with data-testid attributes

admin_create_modal.description: Create ticket modal opens, has employee selection dropdown (admin only), category/subcategory dropdowns, priority buttons

admin_ticket_detail.description: Ticket detail modal has 3 tabs: Details, Timeline, Actions. Actions tab allows status update with notes and resolution.

employee_page_stats.description: Employee Support Tickets page shows personal stats (Total/Open/In Progress/Resolved)

employee_create_modal.description: Raise ticket modal shows 6 category cards with icons. Selecting category shows subcategory dropdown. Priority buttons labeled 'Not urgent/Moderate/Very urgent'

employee_empty_state.description: 'No tickets yet' message shown with 'Raise Your First Ticket' button for new employees

category_icons.description: Each category has distinct icon: Monitor (IT), HeartHandshake (HR), Banknote (Finance), Briefcase (Admin), Scale (Compliance), Activity (Operations)

status_badges.description: Status badges with appropriate colors: Open (blue), In Progress (purple), Waiting for Approval (amber), On Hold (orange), Resolved (emerald), Closed (slate), Rejected (red)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test tickets prefixed with TEST_ during backend testing. Admin can create tickets for self or on behalf of employees. Employee test user has no existing tickets.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Issue Ticket System fully implemented and tested. Backend: db.issue_tickets collection. Routes at /api/issue-tickets/*. Admin page: IssueTickets.js at /issue-tickets. Employee page: EmployeeIssueTickets.js at /employee/tickets (via 'Support Tickets' sidebar link). 6 categories auto-assign to different department roles. Status workflow: Open -> In Progress -> Waiting for Approval -> On Hold -> Resolved -> Closed/Rejected. Employees can close resolved tickets and submit feedback (1-5 rating + comment).
